channel.title: nano-zyrkel-vusTracker — Classification Changes
channel.description: ClinVar variant classification changes detected by nano-zyrkel

item.title: ALDH2 other → other
item.description: NM_000690.4(ALDH2):c.1510G>A (p.Glu504Lys) in gene ALDH2 changed from drug response to not provided (OMIM)

item.title: MYBPC3 path. → l.path.
item.description: NM_000256.3(MYBPC3):c.26-2A>G in gene MYBPC3 changed from pathogenic to likely pathogenic (Institute of Human Genetics, University of Leipzig Medical Center)

item.title: CAPN3 l.path. → path.
item.description: NM_000070.3(CAPN3):c.550del (p.Thr184fs) in gene CAPN3 changed from likely pathogenic to pathogenic (Genetic Diseases Diagnostic Center, Koc University Hospital)

item.title: TTN l.path. → path.
item.description: NM_001267550.2(TTN):c.97114dup (p.Arg32372fs) in gene TTN changed from likely pathogenic to pathogenic (Labcorp Genetics (formerly Invitae), Labcorp)

item.title: TTN l.path. → path.
item.description: NM_001267550.2(TTN):c.94182_94183insAGCAGCT (p.Leu31395fs) in gene TTN changed from likely pathogenic to pathogenic (Labcorp Genetics (formerly Invitae), Labcorp)

item.title: ADAR VUS → path.
item.description: NM_001111.5(ADAR):c.577C>G (p.Pro193Ala) in gene ADAR changed from VUS to pathogenic (Institute of Human Genetics, University of Leipzig Medical Center)

item.title: TTN l.path. → path.
item.description: NM_001267550.2(TTN):c.72828_72831dup (p.Thr24278fs) in gene TTN changed from likely pathogenic to pathogenic (Labcorp Genetics (formerly Invitae), Labcorp)

item.title: RNF170 VUS → l.path.
item.description: NM_030954.4(RNF170):c.304T>C (p.Cys102Arg) in gene RNF170 changed from VUS to likely pathogenic (Genomic Research Center, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences)

item.title: SCN2A VUS → path.
item.description: NM_001040142.2(SCN2A):c.605C>T (p.Ala202Val) in gene SCN2A changed from VUS to pathogenic (Ambry Genetics)

item.title: KDM5A path. → VUS
item.description: NM_001042603.3(KDM5A):c.4048C>T (p.Arg1350Ter) in gene KDM5A changed from pathogenic to VUS (Institute of Human Genetics, University of Leipzig Medical Center)

item.description: NM_001080421.3(UNC13A):c.2786G>A (p.Gly929Glu) in gene UNC13A changed from VUS to likely pathogenic (Institute of Human Genetics, University of Leipzig Medical Center)

item.description: NM_001042492.3(NF1):c.2530C>T (p.Leu844Phe) in gene NF1 changed from likely pathogenic to pathogenic (Ambry Genetics)
